item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I Was Defamed on Twitter: 15 Million People Saw It
item.description: New Vid is about 15 Million people seeing me being used to sell a major Anti-P0rn App without my consent... Yeeeesh... And somehow @imgur is involved again... Outside of that though, this vid is about what it’s actually like existing online as a trans woman, and the gendered spectrum of online bullying/harassment, including: • How quickly dehumanization happens • Why attacks become personal instead of critical • The emotional toll of harassment at scale • Why “just ignore it” isn’t realistic • How we can humanize each other again Am over there Live Chatting this morning at the video premiere at 7:30am PST - https://youtu.be/Qq00Mzofrq0
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Etch A Sketching at the Museum of Modern Art!
item.description: Weeee! Etch A Sketching at museums is fun. I used to do it more around a decade ago and this NYC trip was the perfect opportunity to dip my toes back into it. I would have loved to have etched The Starry Night but it was so consistently swarmed that I would have felt bad about camping out in front of it, even if I was only there for 11 minutes. I very intentionally stood a fair distance away from Gustav Klimt's Hope to allow others to pass in front of me, but everyone refused to eclipse my view which was so sweet (but I still felt bad lol).
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: A day of celebration for me!
item.description: Long story short, got divorced in 2018; she cheated, lied about it, put a protective order on me, and I couldn't handle it. I hurt myself, things kept escalating, and I eventually took a plea deal for F3 with 36 months court probation, to reduce after completing probation. That 36 months completed in November, 2025 and I filed for the reduction in January, which was approved and signed in February. I went to court today to finalize the process and I am 100% no longer a felon! Now I can get a job without having to explain it; without risking being terminated due to it as I have in the past. Now life returns to normal. I'm so relieved. I'm gonna buy some liquor to celebrate.
item.dc:creator: nation543

item.title: Our country is run be corrupt idiots and pedos.
item.description: Trump said he refuses to sign any bill until the SAVE Act is passed. The veto power vested in the President by Article I, Section 7 of the Constitution has proven to be an effective tool in the executive branch's dealings with Congress. In order for a bill to become law, the President either signs the bill into law, or the President allows the bill to become law without signature after a 10-day period. https://www.congress.gov/crs-product/RS22188
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Day # whatever of mental illness
item.description:
Between health emergencies, family emergencies, the upcoming first anniversary of my grandma’s death, my business absolutely taking off… I’m at my limit. I’m overwhelmed, sick and tired all the time, desperate for answers about my health and how to feel normal again. For the last 20 years, self harm has been my go-to in situations like these. I’d rather feel physical pain than deal with the overwhelming negative emotions. Self-harm is pain I can control, and that makes me feel better in its own fucked up way. But chat I am TRYING. I am trying so fucking hard to be a better person for my kid and not pass down this trauma and unhealthy coping mechanism. I’m trying so hard to be a more stable, steady, healthy person for my partner. I’m trying so hard not to unnecessarily to worry my mom and baby brother. I’m trying… and so far I’m fucking winning. #memes #socially_awkward_awesome_penguin #mental_health #winning
I was brutally honest with my therapist yesterday. I was seriously afraid she might suggest (or worse, force) an in-patient psych stay. But instead, she TRUSTED me. She and I came up with a safety plan and I promised to stick to it. And I am. I was then brutally honest with my spouse, my mom, and my best friend. All of them met my confession with compassion and all of them want to help. Everyone still loves me, even though I am incredibly flawed and sick. And that gave me even more incentive not to relapse. To everyone who is battling their demons right now- I see you. I hear you. I AM you. And my inbox is open if you don’t have a support system you can lean on.
item.dc:creator: stonedlikeicheckedoutmedusa

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1635 (absinthe owl)
item.description:
let's get this bread
i dreamed last night about an alternate universe where HP Lovecraft not only wrote eldritch horror... but was also a surfer bro. Also the tip of Florida was missing and there were surfing waves there.
in the dream, I was hunting for shark teeth with a friend who was a paleontologist in the missing tip of Florida, known as "the bite" and it was a spot known for surfing and surf culture because of the unique underwater geology and geography blah blah and he was also a surf bro and other surfers had like, dagon/cthuhlu swim trunks, and decorated eldritch surfboards with spooky tentacles and there was an eldritch Tiki bar with cocktails named after Lovecraftian monsters and we were looking for fossil Otodus megalodon teeth and fossil whale bones while floating on our surfboards and surfing.
OH, and in this universe, the narrator character in A Shadow over Innsmouth was a surfer.
damn.
clearly inferior quality copper in the wires.
the white-crowned sparrows have left :-( I miss my sparrow buddies already and it's only been two days.
Well... okay. Two finally showed up. Most mornings, there's like, 15 out there grabbing a snack, though.
in my usual squad, we refer to "stim taxes" as "birds" and "Audible groans" as "eddies"
I rely on bird scientific names and obscure as fuck grape varietals when it comes to place names in my DnD setting.
i believe this is an Etruscan artifact: a coffin basically
an alternate universe where some samurai ended up in the Pacific Northwest.
European Catholics
again, I always love a good meme about the Taiping Rebellion.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin! Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Elle Cordova (@ellecordova@threads.net): Thoughts and prayers to the EPA :(
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: GovBrief Today #403
item.description: Running a prison or winning a billion dollar drone contract no longer requires experience. ICE just awarded $426 million to two firms with little or no detention experience to convert warehouses into large-scale holding centers. Neither has ever run an ICE facility, and they'll now be responsible for thousands of detained migrants as part of a $38 billion buildout that includes centers holding up to 10,000 people each. That casual disregard for competence extends to the Pentagon. Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump are backing a new drone company targeting $1.1 billion in Pentagon contracts that exist because their father created drone initiatives and banned Chinese competitors. The company and its CEO have never worked in aerospace or defense, just like the detention firms have never run a jail. The government bypassed its own contracting officers to award the detention deals without competitive bidding. Firms with decades of experience said the timeline was too aggressive. Access, rather than experience, is the new price of admission. We've emailed 6,500+ stories over 403 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/ogles-muslims [2] https://go.govbrief.today/afghanistan-wrongful-detention [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar9 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-ranch-search [5] https://go.govbrief.today/arizona-subpoena [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-save-act [7] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-civilians [8] https://go.govbrief.today/live-nation-settlement [9] https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-sues [10] https://go.govbrief.today/auto-dismissal [11] https://go.govbrief.today/us-attorneys-dqd [12] https://go.govbrief.today/jackson-criticizes-scotus [13] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-untested-firms [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ntsb-inman-cause [15] https://go.govbrief.today/kiley-gop-split [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-drones [17] https://go.govbrief.today/oregon-protesters Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Tuesday UNHINGED MEME DUMP To Help You Get To The End Of Weekend #519
item.description:
1
2. When a girl touches my...
3
4. Going all in
5. Too true
6. What alternative can we use here?
7. "hey, do you wanna play brick?"
8. Hungry? yeah? Let's go
9. A standard day in Russia
10
11. Friendship with trust broken
12
13
14. "Call the fishes to war!"
15. With the last post I wanted to share my progress on my game The Milgram Experiment. So me and my brother are a two man team, who love games and currently working on this ethics question game. Think of it as a mix between Papers, Please, Severance (The Show) and realistic visuals of games like Pools and Unrecord. So in the game you will get to decide who lives and who dies between different subjects. And you get to study their lives and listen to their interviews. I was thinking of ways on how to make it more realistic and I got face tracking and mocap to work!!! This is my first initial results! :))) If you like the idea of the game, please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
